title: Blanch Ukrainian Rice Pilaf
description: A simple, savory Ukrainian dish made with flat rice noodles and blanched vegetables. This recipe serves one as a solo dinner, making it a great option for a quick weeknight meal or a nutritious lunch.
instructions: Bring the water to a boil in a large saucepan.
Add the vegetable oil, salt, and black pepper to the saucepan.
Add the flat rice noodles to the saucepan and cook for 5 minutes, or until slightly softened.
Add the mixed vegetables to the saucepan and cook for an additional 2 minutes, or until tender but still crisp.
Drain the noodles and vegetables in a colander and return them to the saucepan.
Sprinkle the chopped fresh dill over the noodles and vegetables.
Serve the Blach Ukrainian Rice Pilaf hot, garnished with additional fresh dill if desired.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Note: Traditionally, this dish is blanched, but if you prefer a softer texture, you can cook the noodles and vegetables for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until tender.
